title: Godon Takes Drastically Shortened Stage of Paris-Nice, Vingegaard Delayed by Crash
content:
Race leader Jonas Vingegaard finishes over a minute behind Dorion Godon after a cluster of riders crash in finale.

Read the full article at Godon Takes Drastically Shortened Stage of Paris-Nice, Vingegaard Delayed by Crash on Velo.
author: sstokes
